Author: dajoey
Name: Armoire Auto-Fill (Testing)
Punchline: TESTING — armoire gear tracker rewrite (Cabinet + LuminaSupplemental data)
Description: TESTING build. Lists every armoire-eligible item in the game and shows whether each is in your inventory, in your armoire, or missing. Will be replaced by the non-testing build once verified.
Changelog: v0.2.1 (testing) - Fix slot labels (was "Unknown" everywhere; EquipSlotCategory mapping was off-by-two). Switch armoire detection to ItemFinderModule->CabinetItemUnlockBits — no longer need to open the armoire UI; the cabinet cache loads on login. Auto-scan inventory whenever the main window opens or the cabinet snapshot changes. Add per-state ownership counts and last-scan timestamp. Bump LuminaSupplemental.Excel 4.3.1 -> 4.3.3 for newer dungeon drop data.
